name: download_file
description: Download a file from hub.ag3nts.org. Provide the full URL including any placeholder API key — the real key is injected automatically. Example: https://hub.ag3nts.org/data/APIKEY/people.csv

url.description: Full URL to the file on hub.ag3nts.org (e.g. https://hub.ag3nts.org/data/APIKEY/people.csv)
